text: Oh great, another Monday morning meeting that could have been an email. Truly living the dream.
Thank you so much for covering my shift yesterday — you really saved me.
Wow, the printer jammed again. What a surprise. Nothing has ever gone this well for me.
The new coffee machine makes genuinely good espresso. I'm impressed.
Sure, I'd LOVE to review your 80-slide deck by tomorrow morning. No problem at all.
Congratulations on the promotion — you've earned every bit of it.
Fantastic. The wifi died right as I hit submit. The universe has impeccable timing.
The quarterly numbers look solid this time. Good work, everyone.
Nice. Really nice. Love that for us.
Interesting choice to put the documentation behind a login wall.
You brought donuts? You're my hero.
Cool cool cool. Totally fine. Everything is fine.
I appreciate you flagging that bug before the release.
Ah yes, the classic 'works on my machine'. My favorite genre of bug report.
Well, that went about as well as expected.
